text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I can offer no excuse for such a miserable
showing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Though I do not believe I was neglectful in my
preparations, I do feel as though I could have
done more.
choice_data_list: There was nothing wrong with your running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the encouragement. I, too, believe
that I successfully tapped into my full potential.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What I need to do now is hone my abilities until
first place is within reach. I do hope you'll assist
me in this endeavor.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...! Of course. I have no intention of simply giving
up now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall use the sting of this defeat to spur me on
during training, starting tomorrow. I shan't let you
down.
